scripts.deploy:s3:assets: aws s3 sync dist s3://rc-rdsystem-dev --region ap-northeast-1 --profile dev-developer --delete --exclude "index.html" --exclude "*.html" --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"
scripts.deploy:s3:html: aws s3 cp dist s3://rc-rdsystem-dev --region ap-northeast-1 --profile dev-developer --recursive --exclude "*" --include "*.html" --include "index.html" --cache-control "no-store, must-revalidate, max-age=0" --content-type "text/html; charset=utf-8"
